data.content: Implementation review complete. Stale settings keys feature (agent, verification, actions.direct detection and cleanup) integrated on main with all conflicts resolved. 137 tests pass, typecheck clean. Commits: b06ac8d9, 7d806ae3, b802cca6 (original), 49b9caec, 3cd12ec4 (integration). Features: inspectStaleSettingsKeys, cleanStaleSettingsKeys in settings.ts; checkStaleSettingsKeys + applyFix case in doctor.ts; updateRegisteredRepoMemoryManagerType in registry.ts; comprehensive test coverage.
